TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Don_Ackerman, title = Don_Ackerman, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Don_Ackerman} }

S.FORM: Don Ackerman nalecuhan i New York City, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput. 9 bulad 4 demiad, 1930 a mihca, Don Ackerman, miunduay. (mapatay i 2011 a mihca)
S.PHON: don aʦkərman nar~ɾəʦuħan i nəw jork ʦitj, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput. * bur~ɾad * dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, don aʦkərman, miunduaj. (mapataj i **** a miħʦa)
S.FORM: Don Ackerman nalecuhan i New York City, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput. 9 bulad 4 demiad, 1930 a mihca, Don Ackerman, miunduay. (mapatay i 2011 a mihca)
S.PHON: don aʦkərman nar~ɾəʦuħan i nəw jork ʦitj, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput. * bur~ɾad * dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, don aʦkərman, miunduaj. (mapataj i **** a miħʦa)
